description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows MinGW x86 that runs on push to master and pull request open or synchronize events, ignoring changes to markdown files and docs. The workflow should set up an ubuntu-22.04 environment, check out the repository, install Mingw-w64 and dependencies, configure CMake for a MinGW build, build the project, and upload the package as an artifact if not in an Actions test environment.
